home.count0: No one has found the player of the day yet.
home.count: {count, plural, one {# person has} other {# people have}} already found the player of the day.
home.findedMessage: Well done! Come back tomorrow for the next player.

loginDiscord.text: Log in to appear in the global rankings and save your progress!

dialogWin.title: Well done!
dialogWin.winnerMessagePrefix: The player of the day was
dialogWin.shareText:
I found the Player of the Day after {nbPlayers} attempts on M8DLE ({m8dleUrl})

Here are my results :
{result}

#M8WIN #M8DLE

precisions.responseIndicatorsContent: After each attempt, indicators appear to help you get closer to the player of the day.
precisions.upArrows: Up arrows: the desired value is higher than the one suggested.
precisions.downArrows: Down arrows: the value you are looking for is lower than the one suggested.
precisions.dataUpdateContent: The data was last updated on 20 February 2026. Please let us know if you notice any incorrect or inconsistent information so that we can correct it as soon as possible.
precisions.displayingTeamsContent: The teams displayed correspond to the main organisations. For example, G2 Minnesota, Twisted Minds Orchid and Karmine Corp Blue will be listed under the names G2 Esports, Twisted Minds and Karmine Corp respectively.

credits.title: CREDITS
credits.developmentItem1: Swann Gillé - Design, development, graphic design, user interface.
credits.developmentItem3: Front-end / React / Next.js - Creation of the site's interface and logic.
credits.developmentItem4: Back-end / Neon / Vercel - Hosting and database.
credits.designItem1: Fonts used for the site: Tusker Grotesk for headings, Inter for the rest of the text.

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.dataCollectedIntro: M8DLE collects the following information when you use the site:
privacy.identityText: email and Discord username for account creation and management.
privacy.gameDataText: player performance and all their daily attempts.
privacy.analyticsText: anonymous data to measure site usage via Vercel (traffic statistics, errors).
privacy.purposeIntro: The collected data is used exclusively to:
privacy.purposeItem3: Ensuring the operation and security of the site.
privacy.purposeOutro: M8DLE does not sell or rent your data to third parties.
privacy.sharingItem1: Data is stored on Neon database servers and on Vercel hosting for site sessions and features.
privacy.sharingItem2: It is not shared with any other organization or company.
privacy.cookiesItem1: M8DLE uses cookies to manage user sessions and improve navigation.
privacy.cookiesItem2: These cookies are valid for 7 days and can be deleted via your browser settings.
privacy.cookiesItem3: Cookies are used solely for security and website functionality purposes.
privacy.rightsIntro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.accessText: to know what data we hold about you.
privacy.rectifyText: to correct your data if it is incorrect.
privacy.deleteText: Request the deletion of your personal data.
privacy.portabilityText: retrieve your data in a structured format.
privacy.contactPrefix: To exercise your rights, contact us at:
privacy.securityItem1: User data is stored securely, and sessions are protected by JWT encryption.
privacy.securityItem2: We implement measures to prevent unauthorized access or data loss.
privacy.minorsItem1: M8DLE is accessible to everyone, including minors.
privacy.minorsItem2: We recommend that parents or guardians supervise younger users' use of the site.
privacy.changesItem1: This policy may be updated at any time.
privacy.changesItem2: The latest version will always be available on the site.

legal.title: LEGAL NOTICE
legal.ipText1: All content on this site (text, images, etc.) is the exclusive property of M8DLE, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, distribution, or modification, in whole or in part, is strictly prohibited without prior written permission.
legal.ipText2: M8DLE is a fan project. It is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Gentle Mates or any other organization mentioned on the site.
legal.ipText3: The names of the organizations mentioned on the site remain the exclusive property of their respective owners.
legal.dataText1: To use certain features of the site (account creation, score tracking), M8DLE collects email addresses and/or Discord usernames.
legal.dataText2: The data is used solely for managing accounts and game features.
legal.dataText3: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, modify, correct, and delete your personal data. To exercise this right, please contact:
legal.dataText4: The site also uses cookies to manage user sessions and improve the user experience. These cookies are used solely for security and navigation purposes.
legal.liabilityText: M8DLE cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damages that may result from accessing or using the site, nor for the interpretation of the information presented on it.
legal.linksText: The site may contain links to other sites. M8DLE has no control over their content and accepts no liability for these third-party sites.
legal.lawText: This site is governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

metadata.title: M8DLE - Guess the Gentle Mates Player of the Day
metadata.description: M8DLE is a daily game inspired by Wordle and set in the Gentle Mates universe. Guess the player of the day and compare your score with the community.
